name: coLssInqProdCode
title: coLssInqProdCode
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
This service causes the determination of the product code of a LSS slave. It is available in configuration mode only and there may only be one LSS slave in this mode.
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];coLssInqProdCode( errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "LSS inquire Product-Code commanded" );}
